creator: sabrinahoon@yahoo.com
text:
between march 10th and march 25 my password was changed and i did not change them. i moved to a different address than old which was at 230 cottonwood st. buffalo and also he admitted to changing my password so he could find something on me i did not give him permission to change my password or even to look at my acount..

Fix: 

i think he should be threatened of identity theft and i need reassurance this will never happen again...questions may b changed for security
How-To-Repeat: i want to ensure that only i can open my account and password cant be changed but by me. i believe he hired a hacker for 125 dollars to break in...at least that is what he tells me
